examples: You may quickly lose your way in flowing and drifting now.
Some roads are closed because of drifting.
He hasn't decided what to do yet—he's just drifting.
Drifting in a kayak is one of the best ways to spot a mother otter with her pup.
ERS-1 and Envisat both suffered major failures that left them drifting uncontrolled through LEO.
